title: Notice of Dissolution
body:
Notice of Dissolution
Company: RDANDX NETWORK HOLDING LTD
Registered Number: 000004796
Notice ID: 00811/2026
Publication Date: 23 Jun 2026
Notice of Dissolution Submission of liquidators final report and shareholders resolution Dissolution completed pursuant to the liquidators final report and shareholders resolution is dated 23 March 2026. It was lodged with ADGM RA by the appointed liquidator Mr. Umesh Narayanappa by email. Pursuant to the provisions contained in section 294 of ADGM Insolvency Regulations, the legal entity is deemed to be dissolved on the expiration of three (3) months from the date of dispatch of the final account and return by the liquidator to the creditors.

title: Other
body:
Other
Company: FRONTIER FOUNDATION
Registered Number: 17192
Notice ID: 00787/2026
Publication Date: 18 Jun 2026
Other Notice of Liquidation FRONTIER FOUNDATION (IN VOLUNTARY LIQUIDATION) (THE “FOUNDATION”) REGISTRATION NUMBER: 17192. TAKE NOTICE that the Foundation was put into liquidation on 26 March 2026 by a resolution passed by written resolution of the Council members of the Foundation executed on 26 March 2026. AND FURTHER TAKE NOTICE that Gwynn Hopkins of Perun Consultants (DIFC) Limited, Level 25, Al Sila Tower, Abu Dhabi Global Market, Al Maryah Island, PO Box Number: 764743, has been appointed voluntary liquidator of the Foundation. AND NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN that creditors of the Foundation are to prove their debts or claims within 21 days of the publication of this notice and to establish any title they may have by sending their names, addresses and the particulars oftheir debts or claims to the undersigned, or in default thereof they will be excluded from the benefit of any distribution made before such debts and/or claims are proved or from objecting to the distribution. Voluntary Liquidator: Gwynn HopkinsTel: + 971 55 832 2845 /Email: ghopkins@perunconsultants.com

title: Other
body:
Other
Company: JT SFO LIMITED
Registered Number: 30970
Notice ID: 00759/2026
Publication Date: 10 Jun 2026
Other Notice of Liquidation JT SFO LIMITED (“the Company”), a Company formed and registered under the laws of the Abu Dhabi Global Market, with registered number – 30970, was put into Members Voluntary Liquidation (MVL) on 01 June 2026 by a special resolution passed by the shareholders on 01 June 2026. Mahesha Shetty has been appointed as Liquidator of the Company effective from01 June 2026, date of shareholders resolution. The creditors of the Company are to prove their debts or claims within 21 days of the publication of this notice and to establish any title they may have by sending their names, addresses and the particulars of their debts or claims to the Liquidator. Failing which the same shall be deemed to have been waived or from objecting to the distribution.For any inquiries relating to the Members Voluntary Liquidation, the interested parties may contact the appointed Liquidator whose details are below: LIQUIDATOR DETAILS: Mahesha ShettyADGM Insolvency PractitionerContact details:Mob: +971 55 8991416Tel: +971 4 455 1010Email: mahesh@kpi.coWebsite: www.kpi.co BUSINESS ADDRESS: 2409C, Floor 24, Tamouh Tower, Al Reem Island, Abu Dhabi, U.A.E SERVICE ADDRESS: Office 310, Dubai Supreme Court Complex, Umm Hurair 02,Dubai, U.A.E. PO Box - 121395

When two months have passed since the publication of this notice, unless cause is shown to the contrary, the Registrar will strike the company’s name off the register and the company will be dissolved. Upon the Company’s dissolution, all property and rights whatsoever vested in, or held in trust for, the company immediately before its dissolution are deemed to be bona vacantia, and accordingly belong to the Board of Directors of the Abu Dhabi Global Market.

NOTICE IS FURTHER GIVEN that Paul Leggett of Deloitte & Touche (M.E.) LLP with business address at 1101, 11th, Al Sila Tower, Abu Dhabi Global Market Square, Al Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, has been appointed as the voluntary liquidator of the Company. Any creditors of the Company are hereby notified to prove their debts or claims within 21 days of the publication of this notice and to establish any title they may have by sending their names, addresses and the particulars of their debts or claims to the liquidator at the registered address noted above or by email to paleggett@deloitte.com. This notice is published pursuant to Part 3, Chapter 5, Sections 192 and 194 of the ADGM Insolvency Regulations.

title: Other
summary: NCLUDE FINTECH INNOVATION FUND GP LTD · 13 May 2026
body:
Other
Company: NCLUDE FINTECH INNOVATION FUND GP LTD
Registered Number: 000006895
Notice ID: 00620/2026
Publication Date: 13 May 2026
Other Notice of Liquidation This notice is being issued by NCLUDE FINTECH INNOVATION FUND GP LTD which is Abu Dhabi Global Market ("ADGM) based entity (here in after — The Entity) registered under the laws of ADGM on 27 January 2022 as a Private Company Limited by Shares with registration number 000006895 , to inform the public the Entity is put in liquidation effective May 6 , 2026. Any person having any claim or objection whatsoever to this planned voluntary dissolution of the Company should contact Mr. Umesh AN (liquidator) in writing at the below address within Twenty-One (21) days from the date of publication of this notice, failing which all claims or objections shall be deemed to have been waived. Other Notice of Liquidation UTICO HOLDING LIMITED (IN VOLUNTARY LIQUIDATION) (“THE COMPANY”)REGISTRATION NUMBER: 19989. TAKE NOTICE that the Company was put intoliquidation on 16 April 2026 by a special resolution passed by written resolution of the shareholders of the Company executed on 16 April 2026. AND FURTHER TAKE NOTICE that Luke Petith of 2462ResCowork01, 24th Floor, Al Sila Tower, Abu Dhabi Global Market Square, Al Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, has been appointed voluntary liquidator of the Company. AND NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN that creditors of the Company are to prove their debts or claims on or before 14 May 2026 and to establish any title they may have by sending their names, addresses and the particulars of their debts or claims to the undersigned, or in default thereof they will be excluded from the benefit of any distribution made before such debts and/or claims are proved or from objecting to the distribution. Luke Petith, Voluntary LiquidatorContact: 2462ResCowork01, 24th Floor, Al Sila Tower, Abu Dhabi Global MarketSquare, Al Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi, United Arab EmiratesTel: +971 4 363 7999, Email: ADGMLiquidations@walkersglobal.com

Notice is hereby given that the creditors of the Fund, which is being voluntarily wound up, are required, on or before 30 April 2026, to send in their full names and addresses, full particulars of their debts or claims against the Fund and the names and addresses of their solicitors (if any), to the Liquidator, and, if so required by notice in writing from the Liquidator, are required, personally or by their solicitors, to come in and prove their debts or claims at such time and place as shall be specifled in such notice Any-creditor of the Fund that fails to comply with this notice or any further instructions of the Liquidator shall be excluded from the benefit of any distribution made oy on behalf of the Fund. All claims are to be submitted by emall at: faith@sajjadhaider.com Zahra Halder Liquidator

Other Notice of Liquidation IN THE MATTER OF FZG INVESTMENT LIMITED – IN LIQUIDATION ADGM REGISTERED NUMBER: 20743 NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN pursuant to Section 182 of Chapter 3, Part 3 of the ADGM Insolvency Regulations that a final general meeting of the Company will be held at 11.00 AM Gulf Standard Time (GST) on 20 May 2026 for the purpose of approving the conduct of the liquidation, liquidator’s report, statement of assets and liabilities and remuneration charged by the liquidator. The final general meeting will be held via an online meeting. The instructions on how to join the meeting will be sent to the shareholders ahead of the meeting. For further information and details, please contact Sameer Khan at sameer.khan@ae.gt.com on or before 18 May 2026. Sameer Khan Liquidator FZG INVESTMENT LIMITED – IN LIQUIDATION

title: Other
body:
Other

Other Notice of Liquidation FINSCHIA DLT FOUNDATION (“the Foundation”), a foundation formed andregistered under the laws of the Abhu Dhabi Global Market, with registerednumber – 15682, was put into Voluntary Liquidation on 02 April 2026 bya special resolution passed by the Founder of the Foundation executed on02 April 2026. Mahesha Shetty has been appointed as Liquidator of the Foundation effectivefrom 02 April 2026, date of Founders resolution.The creditors of the Foundation are to prove their debts or claims within21 days of the publication of this notice and to establish any title they mayhave by sending their names, addresses and the particulars of their debts orclaims to the Liquidator. Failing which the same shall be deemed to have beenwaived or from objecting to the distribution. For any inquiries relating to the Voluntary Liquidation, the interested partiesmay contact the appointed Liquidator whose details are below: LIQUIDATOR DETAILS Mahesha ShettyADGM Insolvency PractitionerContact details:Mob: +971 55 8991416Tel: +971 4 455 1010Email: mahesh@kpi.coWebsite: www.kpi.co BUSINESS ADDRESS 2409C, Floor 24,Tamouh Tower,Al Reem Island,Abu Dhabi, U.A.E. title: Other
body:
Other
Company: POLYVALENT CAPITAL (OEIC) PCC LTD
Registered Number: 000008941
Notice ID: 00454/2026
Publication Date: 16 Apr 2026
Other Notice of Liquidation an Open Ended Investment Company (OEIC) and takes the form of Protected Cell Company (PCC), a private company limited by shares formed and registered under the laws of the Abu Dhabi Global Market, with registered number – 000008941 and its Protected Cell (PC), POLYVALENT CAPITAL I PC, was put into Members Voluntary Liquidation (MVL) on 07 April 2026 by a special resolution passed by the shareholders on 07 April 2026. Mahesha Shetty has been appointed as Liquidator of the Fund and its Protected Cell (PC), POLYVALENT CAPITAL I PC, effective from 07 April 2026, date of shareholders resolution. The creditors of the Fund and/or Protected Cell are to prove their debts or claims within 21 days of the publication of this notice and to establish any title they may have by sending their names, addresses and the particulars of their debts or claims to the Liquidator. Failing which the same shall be deemed to have been waived or from objecting to the distribution. For any inquiries relating to the Members Voluntary Liquidation, the interested parties may contact the appointed Liquidator whose details are below: LIQUIDATOR DETAILS Mahesha ShettyADGM Insolvency PractitionerContact details:Mob: +971 55 8991416Tel: +971 4 455 1010Email: mahesh@kpi.coWebsite: www.kpi.co BUSINESS ADDRESS 2409C, Floor 24,Tamouh Tower,Al Reem Island,Abu Dhabi, U.A.E. SERVICE ADDRESS Office 310,Dubai Supreme Court Complex,Umm Hurair 02,Dubai, U.A.E.PO Box - 121395

Other Notice of Liquidation MAALEXI EDGE LIMITED (IN VOLUNTARY LIQUIDATION) (the ‘’Company’’)(Registration Number 27433). TAKE NOTICE that the Company was put into liquidation on 6 April 2026 by a special resolution passed by written resolution of the sole shareholder of the Company executed on 6 April 2026. AND FURTHER TAKE NOTICE that Luke Petith of 2462ResCowork01, 24th Floor, Al Sila Tower, Abu Dhabi Global Market Square, Al Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, has been appointed voluntary liquidator of the Company.AND NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN that creditors of the Company are to prove their debts or claims on or before 4 May 2026 and to establish any title they may have by sending their names, addresses and the particulars of their debts or claims to the undersigned, or in default thereof they will be excluded from the benefit of any distribution made before such debts and/or claims are proved or from objecting to the distribution. Luke PetithVoluntary LiquidatorContact: 2462ResCowork01, 24th Floor, Al Sila Tower, Abu Dhabi Global MarketSquare, Al Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi, United Arab EmiratesTel: +971 4 363 7999 / Email: ADGMLiquidations@walkersglobal.com

title: Notice of Dissolution
body:
Notice of Dissolution
Company: KOOK HOLDING LIMITED
Registered Number: 000006777
Notice ID: 00422/2026
Publication Date: 13 Apr 2026
Notice of Dissolution Submission of liquidators final report and shareholders resolution Dissolution completed pursuant to the liquidators final report and shareholders resolution is dated 13 Jan 2026. It was lodged with ADGM RA by the appointed liquidator Mr. Luke Petith by email dated 22 Dec 2025 . Pursuant to the provisions contained in section 294 of ADGM Insolvency Regulations, the legal entity is deemed to be dissolved on the expiration of three (3) months from the date of dispatch of the final account and return by the liquidator to the creditors.

Other
Company: MSX LIMITED
Registered Number: 000009903
Notice ID: 00487/2026
Publication Date: 09 Apr 2026
Other Notice of Liquidation IN THE MATTER OF MSX LIMITED – IN LIQUIDATION ADGM REGISTERED NUMBER: 000009903 NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN pursuant to Section 182 of Chapter 3, Part 3 of the ADGM Insolvency Regulations that a final general meeting of the Company will be held at 11.00 AM Gulf Standard Time (GST) on 11 May 2026 for the purpose of approving the conduct of the liquidation, liquidator’s report, statement of assets and liabilities and remuneration charged by the liquidator. The final general meeting will be held via an online meeting. The instructions on how to join the meeting will be sent to the shareholders ahead of the meeting. For further information and details, please contact Sameer Khan at sameer.khan@ae.gt.com or Mujtaba Ahmed at mujtaba.ahmed@ae.gt.com on or before 07 May 2026. Hisham Farouk Liquidator MSX LIMITED – IN LIQUIDATION

Other
Company: FZG Investment Limited
Registered Number: 20743
Notice ID: 00340/2026
Publication Date: 18 Mar 2026
Other Notice of Liquidation NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN that FZG Investment Limited ("the Company") having ADGMregistered number 20743 was put into liquidation on 16 March 2026 by a written resolution ofthe shareholder of the Company. NOTICE IS FURTHER GIVEN that Sameer Khan of Grant Thornton Audit and Accounting Limitedwith business address at Unit 2, Floor 14, Sila Tower, Abu Dhabi Global Market Square, AlMaryah Island, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, has been appointed as the voluntaryliquidator of the Company. The creditors of the Company are hereby notified to prove their debts or claims within 21 daysof the publication of this notice and to establish any title they may have by sending theirnames, addresses and the particulars of their debts or claims to the liquidator, or in defaultthereof they will be excluded from the benefit of any distribution made before such debtsand/or claims are proved or from objecting to the distribution. Sameer Khan , ADGM LiquidatorTel: +971 2 666 9750 , Email: liquidation@ae.gt.comUnit 2, Floor 14, Sila Tower , Abu Dhabi Global Market SquareAl Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates

title: Notice of Dissolution
body:
Notice of Dissolution
Company: PEARL HOLDING CONSORTIUM LTD
Registered Number: 000004923
Notice ID: 00310/2026
Publication Date: 12 Mar 2026
Notice of Dissolution Submission of liquidators final report and shareholders resolution Dissolution completed pursuant to the liquidators final report and shareholders resolution is dated 12 DEC 2025. It was lodged with ADGM RA by the appointed liquidator Mr. Luke Petith by email dated 21 NOV 2025 . Pursuant to the provisions contained in section 294 of ADGM Insolvency Regulations, the legal entity is deemed to be dissolved on the expiration of three (3) months from the date of dispatch of the final account and return by the liquidator to the creditors.

title: Notice of Proposed Strike Off by Registrar
body:
Notice of Proposed Strike Off by Registrar
Company: VIU WORLD LTD
Registered Number: 000007722
Notice ID: 00278/2026
Publication Date: 02 Mar 2026
Notice of Proposed Strike Off by Registrar Registrar’s power to strike off defunct company under s864 of the Companies Regulations 2020 The Registrar of companies has reasonable cause to believe that the above mentioned company is not carrying on business or in operation. When two months have passed since the publication of this notice, unless cause is shown to the contrary, the Registrar will strike the company’s name off the register and the company will be dissolved. Upon the Company’s dissolution, all property and rights whatsoever vested in, or held in trust for, the company immediately before its dissolution are deemed to be bona vacantia, and accordingly belong to the Board of Directors of the Abu Dhabi Global Market.

title: Other
body:
Other
Company: HAUBERK CAPITAL LIMITED
Registered Number: 000009391
Notice ID: 00199/2026
Publication Date: 23 Feb 2026
Other Notice of Liquidation Hauberk Capital Limited, a private company at Abu Dhabi Global Market (ADGM) holding registration number 000009391 and having registeredaddress at Unit No 30, 12th Floor, Al Sila Tower, ADGM Square, Al Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, hereby gives notice that the shareholders of the company in their meeting held on 29th January, 2026, resolved to voluntarily liquidate the ADGM company. Shareholders have appointed Jitendra Thakurdas Gianchandani, an ADGMapproved Insolvency Practitioner as the liquidator for the purpose of theWinding Up and Members’ Voluntary Liquidation (MVL). Any queries, claim or objections regarding the proposed closure of theHauberk Capital Limited, are requested to be forwarded in writing toEmail Id: Admin@hauberkcapital.com or by telephone by calling at+97150-5554315 to HAUBERK CAPITAL LIMITED within twenty-one (21) daysfrom the date of publication of this notice.

Notice of Dissolution
Company: AZIMUT DIVERSIFIED INVOICE FINANCING FUND (OEIC) LIMITED
Registered Number: 000005983
Notice ID: 00121/2026
Publication Date: 10 Feb 2026
Notice of Dissolution Submission of liquidators final report and shareholders resolution Dissolution completed pursuant to the liquidators final report and shareholders resolution is dated 10 Nov 2025. It was lodged with ADGM RA by the appointed liquidator Mr. Sameer Khan by email dated 25 August 2025 . Pursuant to the provisions contained in section 294 of ADGM Insolvency Regulations, the legal entity is deemed to be dissolved on the expiration of three (3) months from the date of dispatch of the final account and return by the liquidator to the creditors.

title: Other
body:
Other
Company: DANCING TECHNOLOGIES HOLDING LIMITED
Registered Number: 000006796
Notice ID: 00059/2026
Publication Date: 22 Jan 2026
Other Notice of Liquidation DANCING TECHNOLOGIES HOLDING LIMITED ("the Company"), a Company formed and registered under the laws of the Abu Dhabi Global Market, with registered number - 000006796, was put into Members Voluntary Liquidation (MVL) on 08 January 2026 by a special resolution passed by the shareholders on 08 January 2026. Mahesha Shetty has been appointed as Liquidator of the Company effective from 08 January 2026, date of shareholders resolution. The creditors of the Company are to prove their debts or claims within 21 days of the publication of this notice and to establish any title they may have by sending their names, addresses and the particulars of their debts or claims to the Liquidator. Falling which the same shall be deemed to have been waived or from objecting to the distribution. For any inquiries relating to the Members Voluntary Liquidation, the interested parties may contact the appointed Liquidator whose details are below: LIQUIDATOR DETAILS: Mahesha Shetty, ADGM Insolvency Practitioner Contact details:Mob: +971 55 8991416, Tel: +971 4 455 1010, Email:mahesh@kpi.co, Website: www.kpi.co BUSINESS ADDRESS: 2409C Floor 24, Tamouh Tower,Al Reem Island, Abu Dhabi,United Arab Emirates. SERVICE ADDRESS: Office 310,Dubai Supreme Court Complex, Umm Hurair 02,Dubai, U.A.E., PO Box -121395

title: Other
summary: MAKASEB REAL ESTATE INVESTMENT SPV LIMITED · 02 Jan 2026
body:
Other
Company: MAKASEB REAL ESTATE INVESTMENT SPV LIMITED
Registered Number: 000001870
Notice ID: 00002/2026
Publication Date: 02 Jan 2026
Other Notice of Liquidation In accordance with the Abu Dhabi Global Market Insolvency Regulations 2022, I,Shahab Haider with registered address at 2446ResCo-work04, 24th Floor, Al Sila Tower, ADGM Square, Al Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates give notice that on 17 December 2025, I was appointed as the Liquidator ofMAKASEB REAL ESTATE INVESTMENT SPV LIMITED, License Number000001870, registered with Abu Dhabi Global Market by resolution of theShareholder of the Company (the "Liquidator"). Notice is hereby given that the creditors of the Company, which is beingvoluntarily wound up, are required, on or before 14 January 2026, to send in theirfull names and addresses, full particulars of their debts or claimsagainst the Company and the names and addresses of their solicitors (if any),to the Liquidator, and, if so required by notice in writing from the Liquidator, arerequired, personally or by their solicitors, to come in and prove their debts orclaims at such time and place as shall be specified in such notice. Any creditor of the Company that fails to comply with this notice or any further instructions of the Liquidator shall be excluded from the benefit of any distribution made by or on behalf of the Company. All claims are to be submittedby email at:fm@comply.ae
